query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A person stands behind glass doors at the far end of a room with one hand raised to the glass. Bright blue light glows from behind the figure and through a transom window above the doors. Diagonal streaks of orange and cyan light sweep across the dark walls, ceiling, and floor. In the foreground, a bed with rounded surfaces extends toward the viewer, while furniture and various objects line the right wall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal interior scene rendered with deliberate motion-blur light painting: sweeping orange and cyan trails arc across the dark walls, ceiling, and floor. A silhouetted figure stands behind glass doors at the far end, one hand raised to the pane, backlit by an intensely blown-out blue doorway that creates extreme exposure contrast with the crushed surrounding shadows. The dreamlike combination of light streaks, ghostly human presence, and oppressive tonal extremes generates an unsettling atmosphere of isolation, with a bed in the foreground and furniture visible along the right wall.
